summary: Promoted ADR 0277 onto `main` as repository version `0.177.125` and first verified platform version `0.130.80` after refreshing from the latest realistic `origin/main` commit `4d3bf1325fb97969368cff1f93946a2e7851c3a8`. The private Typesense runtime remains live on `docker-runtime-lv3`, the controller proxy remains available on `http://100.64.0.1:8016`, the authenticated structured-search route at `https://api.example.com/v1/platform/search/structured` continues to return Typesense-backed catalog data, and the shared Docker recovery path now unseals the local OpenBao stack before post-apply backup recovery is attempted.

verification.check: Focused Typesense, API gateway, and recovery validation bundle
verification.observed: The integrated tree passed the rebased regression slice with `93 passed in 9.32s` across the Typesense runtime, API gateway, Docker recovery, platform-vars, and catalog-sync surfaces, plus `make syntax-check-docker-runtime`, `make syntax-check-typesense`, `make syntax-check-api-gateway`, `make syntax-check-restic-config-backup`, `make validate-generated-vars`, `make validate-generated-slo`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models health-probes alert-rules agent-standards`.

verification.check: Branch-local Typesense runtime and query proof set
verification.observed: The preserved ws-0277 proof bundle confirms the working Typesense listener, controller proxy, collection query, runtime assurance envelope, and authenticated API gateway structured-search route via the `r26` evidence set.

The final `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=typesense env=production` replay succeeded end to end from repository version `0.177.125`, with `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=399 changed=143 failed=0 skipped=76` and `proxmox-host : ok=41 changed=4 failed=0 skipped=16`, while the runtime assurance envelope and the authenticated structured-search route both passed.

The exact-main replay triggered the event-driven Restic config backup path and wrote `receipts/restic-backups/20260331T235950Z.json` with `status: ok`, covering the `config` and `versions_stack` sources and refreshing `receipts/restic-snapshots-latest.json`.

notes: This receipt records the first verified `main`-integrated platform promotion for ADR 0277.

The final exact-main replay started from latest realistic `origin/main` commit `4d3bf1325fb97969368cff1f93946a2e7851c3a8`, which carried repository version `0.177.124` and platform version `0.130.79` before this promotion.
The closeout preserves both the earlier branch-local Typesense query proofs and the final exact-main replay proof so another agent can audit the promotion path without hidden context.
The shared Docker recovery repair was kept explicit rather than papering over the issue: local OpenBao unseal now happens before compose recovery when the recovery helper handles `openbao-agent`.
